allow: Bash(sqlite3 timesheet.sqlite "SELECT uid, timekeeper_id, date(start_time), time(start_time), time(end_time) FROM billing_event WHERE date(start_time) = ''2026-03-16'' LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 timesheet.sqlite "SELECT uid, timekeeper_id, active, date(start_time), time(end_time) FROM billing_event WHERE date(start_time) = ''2026-03-16'';")

Bash(sqlite3 timesheet.sqlite "SELECT be.uid, be.timekeeper_id, be.project_id, be.task_id, p.project_id, t.task_id FROM billing_event be LEFT JOIN project p ON be.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN task t ON be.task_id = t.task_id WHERE date(be.start_time) = ''2026-03-16'';")
